subcodes.first_line: Nay, rather, thou hast formed a fixed resolve to flee from the arena of tribulation and the station of tests. Alas! Alas! Still by the arrows of the enemies [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بلکه پخته ارادهٴ فرار نموده‌ئی که از عرصهٴ بلا و موقف ابتلا بگریزی هیهات هیهات هنوز بسهم اعدا
subcodes.subjects: @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
